name: semiotics
description: this is the study of signs and symbols in communication and culture, a good tools for understanding meaning in our world at a deeper level.

name: phenomenology
description: it's the study of conscious experience, a fascinating dive into our unique human experience, also useful for improving concentration and learning skills.

name: AOC
description: it's astounding how someone so inarticulate can become a lawmaker of a world power, a springboard to understanding the shallowness of the American culture.

name: Trump
description: he's a typical American who excels in scamming people in order to make money, a 21st century authoritarian, narcissist and clown so skilled in deception that he was able to remove the faux-ethical mask that Americans try to hide behind, revealing the corruption of the Democrats, the Republicans, and the American people as a whole.

name: Mormonism
description: this is a powerful American scam operation with an international sales force that uses two-on-one persuation tactics, gaslighting, and typical religious lying-in-your-face strategies in order to drive membership and keep people trapped as paying members inside the cult.

name: Rumman Chowdhury
description: she's a data scientist and former AI lead at Accenture, speaks on the future of AI, often with a positive, proactive outlook.

name: Armin Ronacher
description: he is an Austrian open-source programmer who created the Python web framework Flask, gives a lot of talks and has good perspectives on the Python ecosystem.

name: Hampton Catlin
description: he is an American programmer who created Sass and Haml, most of the videos of him are talks he gave from back in the day before AI, so kind of a retro experience of how the developer community was before artificial intelligence.

name: Lou Andreas-Salomé
description: she was a fascinating woman of the 19th century, a Russian-born psychoanalyst and well-traveled essayist whose diverse intellectual interests led to friendships with distinguished thinkers including Nietzsche, Freud, Paul Rée, and Rilke.

name: Taylor Otwell
description: he is the creator of Laravel (2011), a bit of a bullshitter CEO type, but gives talks and has conversations with developers in which he has valuable perspectives from within the PHP ecosystem.

name: Kent Beck
description: he is an older programmer (born 1961), the creator of test-driven development, founded extreme programming, an author or software design pattern books, a interesting speaker and has healthy views on programming in the age of AI.

name: Greg Lukianoff
description: he is an American lawyer, journalist and free speech activist, he co-authored the book Coddling of the American Mind with Jonathan Haidt, he gives talks and interviews, open and insightful.
